## User Statement
As a [role], I want to [goal/desire] so that [benefit/reason].

## Discussion
[Provide context, background information, and any relevant details about the issue. Include technical considerations, dependencies, or related work.]

## Screenshots or Change Location
[If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the issue. If this relates to specific files or code sections, indicate the location here. Otherwise, write N/A.]

## Recommendation
[Provide suggested approaches, solutions, or next steps. Include links to relevant documentation, similar implementations, or resources that could help address this issue.]
